hero.title: Instant Notifications
hero.description: BITFLOW Notifier is one of our innovative projects. A leading enterprise messaging platform that allows you to send alerts, events, and promotions to your customers quickly, securely, and efficiently.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.description: BITFLOW develops innovative technological solutions for businesses

notifier.title: BITFLOW Notifier
notifier.description: Instant messaging notification platform. Send alerts, events, and promotions to your customers efficiently and securely.

moreProjects.title: More Projects
moreProjects.description: We are working on new innovative projects that will be available soon. Stay updated with our updates.

inDevelopment.title: Projects in Development
inDevelopment.description: We have several projects in production that will be launched in the coming months. Each designed to solve specific business challenges.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.description: Everything you need to communicate efficiently with your customers

instantDelivery.title: Instant Delivery
instantDelivery.description: Your messages arrive in less than a second. State-of-the-art technology to ensure maximum delivery speed.

security.title: Advanced Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption and GDPR compliance. Your data and your customers' data are completely protected.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.description: Complete dashboard with detailed metrics. Know the performance of your campaigns and optimize your communication strategies.

multichannel.title: Multi-Channel
multichannel.description: SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram and more. Send your messages through the channel your customers prefer.

api.title: Powerful API
api.description: Easy integration with your existing system. Documented RESTful API and SDKs for the most popular languages.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Schedule your messages in advance. Automate your campaigns and save valuable time in your day-to-day.

about.title: About BITFLOW
about.description: Technological innovation at the service of businesses
about.heading: Transforming Business Communication
about.paragraph1: BITFLOW is a technology company dedicated to developing innovative solutions that help businesses improve their communication and operational efficiency.
about.paragraph2: Our flagship project, BITFLOW Notifier, is an instant messaging platform that allows businesses to send notifications, alerts, and promotions quickly and efficiently to their customers.
about.paragraph3: We currently have several projects in production that will be launched soon, each designed to solve specific challenges of the modern business world.

ceo.name: Eng. Dario Velez Roman, Ms.
ceo.title: CEO & Founder
ceo.description: Engineer with a Master's degree, leads BITFLOW with innovative vision and commitment to technological excellence. His experience and leadership have been fundamental in the development of our business solutions.

benefits.title: Why Choose BITFLOW?
benefits.description: The complete solution for your business communication needs

roi.title: Increase Your ROI
roi.description: Instant notifications have a 98% open rate, much higher than traditional email. Maximize the impact of your campaigns.

saveTime.title: Save Time and Resources
saveTime.description: Automate your communications and free up your team for more strategic tasks. Our platform does the heavy lifting for you.

scalability.title: Unlimited Scalability
scalability.description: From startups to large corporations. Our infrastructure grows with you without limits.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our team of experts is available at all times to help you get the most out of the platform.

pricing.title: Plans that Adapt to You
pricing.description: Choose the perfect plan for your business. All include a 14-day free trial.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Communication?
cta.description: Join thousands of companies that already trust BITFLOW Notifier for their instant notifications
